g.text: Daily Normal Classification By Sport - SP GetNormal Detailed Flow
, DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL ScanIntervalInSecond - 86400 SECOND) AS ScanDate
IF LastCategoryID IS NULL OR = 0 THEN
INNER JOIN CustomerCategory AS ca ON ca.CategoryID = cc.CategoryID
ORDER BY ca.CategoryPriority ASC, cc.LastModifiedDate DESC
ORDER BY clss.CategoryID ASC, clss.CustID ASC
INNER JOIN CustomerCategory AS ca ON ca.CategoryID = cc.CategoryID
ORDER BY ca.CategoryPriority ASC, cc.LastModifiedDate DESC
ORDER BY clss.CategoryID ASC, clss.CustID ASC
SELECT CustID AS CustId, SportID AS SportGroup
